title: Mace Combat Backport
description: Backports the mace and some related features to older versions
body:
a backport of the mace and other related features from version 1.21

the mace is a weapon that deals more damage when the user falls

look at [wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Mace) for more info

items:

- mace (weapon)
- breeze rod (ingredient)
- wind charge (projectile item)
- heavy core (ingredient)


enchantments:
- density (increase mace damage)
- breach (reduces target's armor effectiveness)
- wind burst (launches users on attack)

extras:
- config option to use snapshot behavior
